item.title: Version 2.0.8
item.description: • Fixed release zip packaging so downloaded builds no longer include AppleDouble metadata files that can break embedded framework code-signing validation.

item.title: Version 2.0.7
item.description: • Fixed App Management permission detection. GhostTile no longer keeps showing the permission alert after access has already been granted.

item.title: Version 2.0.6
item.description:
• Added Spotlight / App Shortcuts integration. Hide, show, and focus managed apps directly from Spotlight (or Shortcuts.app) — type phrases like "Hide Slack with GhostTile" or "Open GhostTile".
  • Removed the Raycast extension. The new Spotlight actions provide the same functionality natively, with no extra install.

item.title: Version 2.0.5
item.description:
• Detect apps with system extensions or driver entitlements and refuse to manage them, with a clear explanation that modifying them would break their drivers.
  • Warn before managing apps with TCC-protected entitlements (microphone, camera, contacts, calendars, location, photos, AppleEvents) — Hide-from-Dock requires re-signing, which revokes the original capability grant.
  • Compatibility warnings now show a confirmation dialog (Continue / Cancel) in the GUI and a y/N prompt in the CLI, instead of blocking with an error.
  • Preserve non-TCC entitlements (App Sandbox, application groups, keychain access, network, custom developer entitlements) during Hide-from-Dock. Previously they were silently stripped due to a codesign-extract bug that read from the wrong stream and returned empty.
  • App Management permission denials now show a guided alert pointing to System Settings → Privacy & Security → App Management, instead of a raw Operation not permitted error.
  • Fixed a launch crash for apps without an existing @executable_path/../Frameworks rpath (e.g. RME TotalMix FX). GhostTile now adds the rpath when needed so the injected helper resolves correctly.

item.title: Version 2.0.4
item.description:
• Improved first-run onboarding with a Dock icon by default and a more compact permission setup flow.
  • Added clearer permission guidance for App Management and Screen & System Audio Recording.
  • Installed the optional command line tool into ~/.local/bin with PATH guidance when needed.
  • Refined the main window sizing, empty state, settings update row, and onboarding visuals.
  • Fixed Terminal command launch so manual sudo commands open a single Terminal window.

item.title: Version 2.0.3
item.description:
• Fixed the menu bar Settings item so it opens the Settings window reliably.
  • Improved CLI install status messaging for app-only updates.
  • Refined the About view with Sponsor and GitHub links.

item.title: Version 2.0.2
item.description:
• Improved permission setup guidance for App Management and Screen & System Audio Recording.
  • Added a draggable helper overlay that follows System Settings and mirrors the permission list layout.
  • Fixed Managed Apps ordering so non-running apps stay stable between refreshes.

item.title: Version 2.0.1
item.description:
• Test build to validate the Sparkle auto-update flow end to end
  • Minor stability fixes and polish

item.title: Version 2.0.0
item.description:
• Complete Swift rewrite with shared core, CLI, and macOS app targets
  • New menu bar workflow, Overview, onboarding refresh, and global shortcuts
  • Cleaner app preparation and restore paths for modern macOS
